title: Near Death Experience
description: Experience divine intervention when you're near death! Displays a little foreshadowing effect when you are almost dying in this game. A little hint about your most likely fate.
body:
# Near-death Experience
Displays a little foreshadowing effect when you are almost dying in this game. A little hint about your most likely fate.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PfLft4TTKdw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Instalation
You need to have [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) installed and configured. Either use a [launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/) for that or just drag and drop this mod into the `mods/` folder. 

## Compatibility
Should be compatible with most mods. Works with sodium.

## Resource pack
You can change the default picture and bell sound with a custom resource pack. The structure of the resource pack must follow this tree diagram:


```
└───assets
    └───near-death-experience
        ├───sounds
            └───bell.ogg
        └───textures
            └───gui
                └───jesus.png
```
I recommend using a [template resource pack](https://texture-packs.com/resourcepack/default-pack/). Don't forget to delete the `minecraft/` folder and keep just the structure as shown above.

## What about 1.21.2+?
Mojang decided to change how the game renders, and I think that's too much work for a solo developer with little spare time.
